---
title: "MLSysBook Playground"
subtitle: "Seven small games. Each one is a real ML systems concept made playable."
description: "Browser mini-games that turn ML systems concepts — pruning, GPU memory, mixed-precision quantization, pipeline parallelism, batch sizing, MoE routing, and convergence — into 60-second arcade loops. Part of the MLSysBook ecosystem."
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/games/common.css">
---

Seven little games. Each one takes about a minute to play and quietly teaches one thing about how ML systems actually work. They share a palette and a vibe with the [ML Systems textbook](/) so they feel like part of the same world.

::: {.mlsp-game-cards}

::: {.mlsp-game-card .mlsp-hero-card}
::: {.mlsp-hero-img}
[![Gradient Lander Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/lander.png)](/games/lander.html)
:::
::: {.mlsp-hero-body}
### Gradient Lander
[Balance batch size and learning rate to converge safely.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Pilot your model down the loss landscape to the global minimum. "Thrust" increases your Batch Size—giving you stable descent, but rapidly burning through your limited VRAM budget. Tilt to steer your Learning Rate. Hit the minimum too fast, or run out of VRAM, and your model diverges.

[▶ Play Gradient Lander](/games/lander.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Large Batch Training &amp; Convergence</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Lunar Lander (1979)</em></div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Pipeline Pacer
[![Pipeline Pacer Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/pipeline.png)](/games/pipeline.html)
[Keep the GPUs fed without bubbling.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Schedule micro-batches across four pipeline stages. If you send too many forwards, memory fills up; if you pause too long, later stages sit idle (pipeline bubble). Balance forward and backward scheduling to maximize throughput.

[▶ Play Pipeline Pacer](/games/pipeline.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Pipeline Parallelism</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Flight Control</em> meets <em>Overcooked</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Tensor Tetris
[![Tensor Tetris Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/oom.png)](/games/oom.html)
[Pack training memory before you OOM.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Parameters anchor at the bottom; activations, gradients, and optimizer states fall in their real proportions. Activations dominate — and that's why you'll OOM.

[▶ Play Tensor Tetris](/games/oom.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol I: Training Memory Constraints</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Tetris</em> meets <em>Dr. Mario</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Pulse Prune
[![Pulse Prune Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/prune.png)](/games/prune.html)
[Shrink a network without breaking it.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

A neural network on a canvas. You've got 45 seconds to remove most of the weights without crashing accuracy. The faint ones are safe; the bright ones are doing real work.

[▶ Play Pulse Prune](/games/prune.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol I: Model Compression &amp; Pruning</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Operation</em> meets <em>Jenga</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Quantization Sharp Shot
[![Quantization Sharp Shot Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/quantization.png)](/games/quantization.html)
[Compress a model before the target blurs.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Shoot a downrange target with per-layer precision dials as your sight. Lower precision saves bits but blurs, jitters, or drifts the target depending on which layer you compressed.

[▶ Play Quantization Sharp Shot](/games/quantization.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol I: Mixed-Precision Quantization</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Silent Scope</em> meets <em>Duck Hunt</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Batch Size Balancer
[![Batch Size Balancer Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/batch.png)](/games/batch.html)
[Push throughput to the edge of OOM.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

A tug-of-war against time. Increase batch size to process more images per second, but watch the memory gauge—if it spikes into the red, you OOM and lose the run.

[▶ Play Batch Size Balancer](/games/batch.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol I: Throughput vs. Memory</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Flappy Bird</em> (staying in the safe band)</div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### MoE Router
[![MoE Router Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/moe.png)](/games/moe.html)
[Distribute tokens, balance the experts.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Tokens fly toward your Mixture of Experts layer. Swipe to route them to the specialized experts without overloading any single one. If an expert's queue fills up, tokens drop.

[▶ Play MoE Router](/games/moe.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Mixture of Experts</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Missile Command</em> meets <em>Fruit Ninja</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Data Loader Dash
[![Data Loader Dash Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/loader.png)](/games/loader.html)
[The CPU preparing data before the GPU starves.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Data blocks slide from left to right toward a glowing "GPU" box. Type the correct letter when the block is in the processing zone to process it. If an unprocessed block hits the GPU, the GPU starves.

[▶ Play Data Loader Dash](/games/loader.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol I: Data Engineering</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Overcooked</em> meets <em>Typing of the Dead</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Checkpoint Roulette
[![Checkpoint Roulette Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/checkpoint.png)](/games/checkpoint.html)
[Fault tolerance and checkpointing at scale.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Hold Spacebar to train your model. Beware of hidden "Node Failure" lightning strikes. If Spacebar is held during a strike, your progress resets. Release safely to write a checkpoint.

[▶ Play Checkpoint Roulette](/games/checkpoint.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Fault Tolerance</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Push-Your-Luck</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Roofline Rider
[![Roofline Rider Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/roofline.png)](/games/roofline.html)
[The Roofline model: Compute vs Memory bound.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Navigate your kernel through operational intensity without hitting the memory or compute ceilings. Dodge incoming vertical walls while staying under the neon Roofline.

[▶ Play Roofline Rider](/games/roofline.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol I: Hardware Acceleration</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Flappy Bird</em> meets <em>Race The Sun</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### All-Reduce Rhythm
[![All-Reduce Rhythm Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/allreduce.png)](/games/allreduce.html)
[Keep the gradients flowing in a perfect ring.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

GPUs are arranged in a ring. A visual metronome expands to hit the outer wire every second. Press 1, 2, 3, or 4 exactly on the beat to fire a gradient chunk to the next GPU clockwise. Perfect timing keeps the pipeline full and increases your combo.

[▶ Play All-Reduce Rhythm](/games/allreduce.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Collective Communication</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Guitar Hero</em> meets <em>Pipe Mania</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Topology Tycoon
[![Topology Tycoon Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/topology.png)](/games/topology.html)
[Build the fabric, avoid the bottlenecks.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

You have 8 GPUs and 20 seconds to build their network topology. Click between two nodes to toggle their connection: None, InfiniBand, or NVLink. Once the run phase begins, packets will flood the network. Maximize your delivered GB/s!

[▶ Play Topology Tycoon](/games/topology.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Network Fabrics</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>SimCity</em> meets <em>Mini Motorways</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### KV Cache Packer
[![KV Cache Packer Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/kvcache.png)](/games/kvcache.html)
[Fit the prompts before memory fragments.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

A Tetris-like grid of requests. Place contiguous blocks to serve them. As they finish at different times, your memory fragments. Unlock Paged Mode to shatter requests into 1x1 blocks and defrag your cache!

[▶ Play KV Cache Packer](/games/kvcache.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: LLM Serving</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Tetris meets Sandfall</em></div>
:::
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Cluster Commander
[![Cluster Commander Thumbnail](/assets/games/covers/cluster.png)](/games/cluster.html)
[Schedule jobs without fragmenting the fleet.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Schedule 1x1, 2x2, and 4x4 jobs on an 8x8 GPU cluster. Don't let scattered small jobs fragment the cluster, or a massive 4x4 pre-training run will block the entire queue and kill your utilization!

[▶ Play Cluster Commander](/games/cluster.html){.mlsp-card-cta}

::: {.mlsp-card-meta}
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>📖 Read:</strong> <a href="#">Vol II: Fleet Orchestration</a></div>
<div class="mlsp-meta-row"><strong>🕹️ Arcade DNA:</strong> <em>Block Puzzle</em></div>
:::
:::

:::

---

*MLSysBook Playground is part of [mlsysbook.ai](/). The games share design vocabulary with the textbook — compute blue, data green, error red, MIT accent — so a figure in the book and a game in your browser feel like the same world.*
